name: roof-widget
description: Widget calculateur de devis toiture — SaaS B2B pour couvreurs

scripts.build: npm run minify && npm run obfuscate
scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator public/widget.min.js --output public/widget.obf.js --compact true --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-threshold 0.75 --rotate-string-array true --shuffle-string-array true --split-strings true --split-strings-chunk-length 10 --identifier-names-generator mangled --control-flow-flattening false --dead-code-injection false
